name: better-peakbagger
description: Adds an interactive elevation & time chart to Peakbagger ascent pages and a stackable beta filter to a peak's ascent list.
author: wilmtang

scripts.build: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json CHANGELOG.md "node_modules/**"
